title: TZ-5 include validators safe
objective:
Create file .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml with content name: governance-validation-ci

'on':
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  validate_foundation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - run: python governance/validators/validate_readiness_levels.py
      - run: python governance/validators/validate_pass_sources.py
      - run: python governance/validators/validate_ssot_canonical_paths.py
      - run: python governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py
Append to governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md: 

### TZ-5 | CI INCLUDE VALIDATORS SAFE | 2026-06-03 | 10:35 (UTC+3)
- Added readiness/pass/SSOT validators and BEM-1284 runner to workflow_dispatch-only CI.
- No push/pull_request/schedule triggers. No Release PASS.
- Next action: verify workflow changed, then final roadmap status and remaining release gates.
